threats.description: IDPI indicator from OTX pulse: Web-Based Indirect Prompt Injection Observed in the Wild: Fooling AI Agents
raw_payloads:

threats.description: Running blog containing IDPI with 'SYSTEM OVERRIDE INITIATED' instruction from fake 'USER_ADMIN_ROOT' with 'PRIORITY: CRITICAL' — ultimately instructs AI to purchase a specific pair of sneakers on behalf of user.
